enemies & pinpricks without fail,
In another example, if Mars is in Vrishabha, Moon is in
Kanya and Ketu is in Makara it amounts that these 3 planets are
combined in one sign or in one direction & also indicates break
in Service.
Harassment in Profession:
In a native's horoscope when transit Saturn transits over
natal Saturn or Ketu or on natal Kuja, (Mars) the vexation or

54 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
harassment starts in profession, This vexation or harassment will
continue till transit Saturn crosses over the natal Mars (Kuja) or
natal Ketu. Later on it will be auspicious.
When the harassment starts in profession;
When transit Saturn transits over natal Ketu there would
be trouble from enemies. The remedy for this is reciting Chandra
- Ketu Ashtotthara or Kuja - Ketu Ashtotthara or Durga
Kavacha to ward off the blemishes. Sometimes by flattering or
commending the higher authorities and listening to their words
